news.t: Xtrackers by DWS Launches Its First Thematic ETFs in the U.S.

holdings.infoBox: UPGR is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are FuelCell Energy stock at 6.10%, Fluence Energy at 3.57%, Bloom Energy at 3.55%, PureCycle Technologies at 3.04%, and Shoals Technologies Group at 2.89%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers US Green Infrastructure Select Equity ETF (UPGR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index consisting of US companies engaged in green energy and sustainable infrastructure. The index screens securities based on various ESG criteria provided by Sustainalytics UPGR was launched on Jul 13, 2023 and is issued by Xtrackers.
infoTable: Solactive United States Green Infrastructure ESG Screened Index

data.title: Xtrackers by DWS Launches Its First Thematic ETFs in the U.S.
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--DWS, one of the world's leading asset managers, announced today the listing of three new thematic exchange-traded funds (ETFs) designed to provide investors equity exposure ...
